supersedes.rationale: Version-1 analyzer guard was indentation-sensitive and rejected the schema-valid ACTIVE registry entry before analysis. Version-2 binds the corrected guard and resolves the unique ACTIVE registry entry for this study record.

analyzer.semantic_method: Deterministic exhaustive enumeration of the frozen finite Boolean modules and query-local projections, with complete retained assignments for models, counterexamples, and witnesses.
analyzer.execution_guard: Refuses any manifest that is not FROZEN, lacks no-prior-result-access attestation, fails exact study/subject/profile identity checks, lacks a unique ACTIVE registry binding for record version 2, or has a mismatched immutable artifact digest.
analyzer.write_policy: Creates one new JSON output with exclusive-create mode; refuses overwrite.
analyzer.guard_correction: Active registry entry resolution no longer depends on a fixed indentation depth for artifact_digest.value and selects the unique ACTIVE entry when SUPERSEDED historical versions share the same record_id.

integrity_tools.schema_validator: jsonschema 4.25.1 from the repository development environment; validation is not part of the semantic analyzer

verification_boundary: Successful parsing, compilation, schema validation, execution, exhaustive enumeration, or absence of a bounded counterexample does not validate all FMO-0.1. The separately retained semantic-validity adjudication is mandatory and can invalidate any machine analysis.
architecture_boundary: This study-local tool provenance selects no model, embedding, storage, retrieval, vendor, application schema, continuous service, or general LCMRP implementation architecture.
execution_boundary: Freezing this superseding record does not authorize analyzer main(), run_kernel(), result creation, findings, closeouts, or M1 completion. Execution requires a later explicit governed increment.
